caption: A series of video call participants are shown in a multi-person gallery view. The participants include a man in a black jacket and glasses who gestures with his hand, a man in a dark shirt and glasses, a woman with blonde hair wearing headphones, a woman with blonde hair in a light-colored top, a person wearing a blue and white patterned garment, a man in a grey zip-up jacket, a man in a white button-down shirt in front of a brick building, and a man with a beard in a dark shirt. The scene remains static across the sequence, showing the same set of individuals in their respective environments, including indoor rooms and one outdoor location. No on-screen text or logos are visible. The participants remain in their designated frames, maintaining their positions as the video progresses.
